title: Kenyans fighting illegally for Russia in Ukraine to be granted amnesty
summary_full: It is illegal for Kenyans to serve in foreign armies and can carry a sentence of up to 10 years in jail.
summary_public: It is illegal for Kenyans to serve in foreign armies and can carry a sentence of up to 10 years in jail.
